reviewer: weekly-hardening-routine (headless Chromium 141 via CDP; no chrome-devtools-mcp in cloud env)

spec_match.rationale: Correctly frames ServiceWorkerAutoPreload as a browser-internal base::Feature with no JS surface; probes only surfaces that exist and says so.

interactive.rationale: Probe button fills the table from real checks (verified: serviceWorker true, navigationPreload true, NavigationPreloadManager true); copy buttons work with graceful clipboard failure.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises probes plus exact switches; delivered.

edge_cases.rationale: Explicitly covers stepped-rollout variance, enterprise policy, and the not-detectable state; the honesty note pre-empts fake-probe expectations.

conformance.rationale: Feature suite covers the same surfaces the table reads.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Scripted CDP run clicked probes and copy; full-page screenshot inspected (table verdicts green/readable).

telemetry_health.rationale: Capability-probe assert wired; KV not queried in this review.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables; emerald/rose verdicts on near-white background.

accessibility.rationale: Native table semantics, role=status summary line, buttons keyboard-reachable.

summary: Honest controls/rollout page; the anti-fake-probe framing is explicit.
